summary: Iteration 43: All 4 Tasks Verified - Solomon Chat, Sunday Morning Engine, Church Onboarding Wizard, Reports & Export System. Backend: 22/22 tests pass. Frontend: All UI components verified working.

task_5_solomon_chat.Send message: PASS - Message sent and 'Solomon is thinking...' shown

task_8_sunday_morning_engine.POST /api/portal/service-checkin: PASS - Returns success or 'Already checked in'
task_8_sunday_morning_engine.GET /api/admin/sunday-morning/notificati: PASS - Returns 6 templates (service_starting, welcome_arrived, kids_reminder, giving_reminder, cafe_ready, post_service)

task_2_church_onboarding.POST /api/platform/churches/create: PASS - Creates new church with unique email
task_2_church_onboarding.5-step wizard flow: PASS - All 5 steps (Church Info, Services, Branding, Admin Account, Review) verified

task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/executive-summary: PASS - Returns membership, giving, attendance, kids data
task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/attendance: PASS - Returns summary and weekly data
task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/groups: PASS - Returns summary and groups list
task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/giving-by-fund: PASS - Returns fund breakdown (requires date params)
task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/giving-by-method: PASS - Returns method breakdown (requires date params)
task_6_reports_export.GET /api/reports/top-donors: PASS - Returns donor list (requires date params)
task_6_reports_export.Executive Summary loads data: PASS - Shows Total Members, Giving, Attendance, etc.

critical_code_review_comments: ReportsPage.jsx correctly implements 11 report types with proper data-testid attributes
ChurchOnboardingWizard.jsx implements 5-step wizard with proper validation
SolomonChat.jsx FAB and panel working correctly with voice input support
Sunday Morning Engine endpoints properly return notification templates and service mode data
CSV export endpoints working for kids-history, attendance, and groups reports

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Solomon Chat, Reports, Onboarding Wizard all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test church via API during backend testing (unique email per run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all 4 tasks: Task 5 (Solomon Chat FAB/panel in portal), Task 8 (Sunday Morning Engine with 6 notification templates), Task 2 (Church Onboarding 5-step wizard), Task 6 (11 report types + CSV export). Note: giving-by-fund, giving-by-method, and top-donors endpoints require start_date and end_date query parameters. DemoWalkthrough modal appears on first visit - dismiss with 'I'll figure it out myself' button.
